title: Kenya's M-PESA Reaches 50 Million Users Across Africa
description: M-PESA has hit a landmark 50 million active users across the continent, cementing its status as Africa's leading mobile money platform. The milestone represents a 30% growth over the past two years driven by expansion into new markets.

title: Nigerian Filmmaker Wins Best Director at International Film Festival
description: Lagos-born director Chioma Obi has taken home the Best Director award at the prestigious Berlin International Film Festival for her debut feature. The film, set in present-day Lagos, received a standing ovation and will be distributed globally this summer.

title: Rwandan Tech Hub Attracts $200M in Foreign Investment
description: Kigali's innovation district has secured over $200 million in foreign direct investment this quarter, with major tech companies establishing regional headquarters. Rwanda's streamlined business environment continues to attract global attention as a gateway to East African markets.

title: South African Scientists Develop Breakthrough Malaria Vaccine
description: Researchers at the University of Cape Town have announced a new malaria vaccine showing 94% efficacy in Phase 3 trials across five African countries. The vaccine could be available for widespread distribution as early as next year, potentially saving hundreds of thousands of lives annually.

title: Ghanaian Entrepreneur Named Forbes Africa 30 Under 30
description: Accra-based fintech founder Kwame Mensah has been named to Forbes Africa's prestigious 30 Under 30 list for his platform that provides microloans to rural farmers. His company has disbursed over $15 million in loans to more than 80,000 smallholder farmers across West Africa.

title: African Diaspora Remittances Hit Record $100 Billion
description: Remittances from the African diaspora to the continent have reached a record $100 billion this year, according to a new World Bank report. The United States, United Kingdom, and France remain the top source countries, with Nigeria, Egypt, and Morocco receiving the largest shares.

title: Ethiopia Opens Africa's Largest Solar Farm
description: Ethiopia has inaugurated the continent's largest solar energy facility, a 500-megawatt plant in the Afar region capable of powering over two million homes. The project, built in partnership with Chinese and European firms, positions Ethiopia as a renewable energy leader on the continent.

title: Afrobeats Artist Burna Boy Breaks Streaming Record
description: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy has become the first African artist to surpass 10 billion streams on Spotify, cementing Afrobeats as a true global genre. His latest album debuted at number one in 23 countries across Europe and the Americas.

title: British-Ghanaian Doctor Appointed Chief Medical Officer in UK
description: Dr. Abena Asante, born in Kumasi and educated at Oxford, has been appointed as the United Kingdom's new Chief Medical Officer, making history as the first person of African descent to hold the role. She has been widely praised for her pioneering work in infectious disease prevention.
